title: Junior Investment Banker at New India Assurance Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at New India Assurance Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with New India Assurance Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Jaipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About New India Assurance Advisory Limited:
New India Assurance Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance Advisory Limited!
